narrative.context: A family member calls and insists you should choose a career path you’re unsure about. You feel overwhelmed and defensive.
narrative.prompt: What response shows effective emotion management?

options.label: Regulate first, then set a respectful boundary
options.description: Slow your breathing, then say: 'I hear your concern. I need time to decide. Can we talk after I gather information?'

ei.rationale: Reduces emotional reactivity and protects relationship while asserting autonomy—effective management.

options.label: Change topic to avoid conflict
options.description: Keep the call pleasant and postpone the discussion without stating your needs clearly.

ei.rationale: Avoids escalation short-term, but may build resentment and doesn’t resolve emotion drivers.

options.label: Argue to prove you’re right
options.description: Debate intensely to win the point.

ei.rationale: Heightens arousal and conflict; emotion takes over the goal.

options.label: Hang up or say something hurtful
options.description: End the call abruptly or insult them.

ei.rationale: Impulsive discharge damages relationship and doesn’t manage emotion effectively.
